name: DOUBLE-OUTLET RIGHT VENTRICLE
definition: DORV = TAUSSIG-BING HEART most of the aorta + pulmonary artery arise from the RV ← maldevelopment of conotruncus

demographics.Associated with: VSD (100%), pulmonary stenosis / atresia (75%), mitral stenosis / atresia,

dominant_finding: NO continuity between mitral valve + adjacent semilunar valve (PATHOGNOMONIC)
distribution: aorta posterior / parallel / anterior to pulmonary artery:
discriminating_features: NO continuity between mitral valve + adjacent semilunar valve (PATHOGNOMONIC)
aorta posterior / parallel / anterior to pulmonary artery:
aorta and pulmonary artery side by side with aorta in D-malposition on the right (most
aorta overriding the interventricular septum with predominant connection to RV
